hero.headline: Find Your Sanctuary
hero.subheadline: A peaceful countryside cottage nestled on 5 acres of tranquil farmland, just minutes from Nelson

property_description.heading: Your Own Private Retreat
property_description.body:
Some places simply feel different the moment you arrive. Sanctuary Cottage is one of them. Set on a quiet 5-acre hobby farm within a 115-year-old villa estate, this charming two-story cottage offers the kind of stillness and space that's hard to find. Pond views, birdsong, open skies — and nothing else to interrupt your peace.

Upstairs, a cozy attic-style bedroom with a king bed. Downstairs, an open-plan living space with a fully equipped kitchen, lounge, and dining area. Your own private driveway, your own lawn, your own hot tub under the stars. The whole guest area is completely separate and fenced, so your retreat is entirely yours.

dog_friendly.heading: Perfect for Dogs and Their Owners
dog_friendly.intro: We understand that your four-legged family member isn't just a pet — they're part of your getaway. Sanctuary Cottage has been thoughtfully designed and fenced to give dogs the freedom and safety they deserve. The entire guest area is fully enclosed, and you'll have access to a dedicated fenced paddock where your dog can run freely, exercise, and play with complete peace of mind.

features.title: Fully Fenced Guest Area
features.description: The entire cottage and surrounding grounds are securely fenced, creating a safe, contained space where your dog can explore and relax without any risk of wandering.

features.title: Private Fenced Paddock
features.description: A dedicated exercise area where your dog can run free and burn off energy in complete safety, perfect for active breeds or dogs who love open spaces.

features.title: Separate from Host Dogs
features.description: Our host's golden retrievers are fenced separately from the guest area, allowing a peaceful stay for dogs who prefer their own space or have specific temperament needs.

features.title: Countryside Setting
features.description: Your dog will experience the joy of rural life — open spaces, fresh air, and the freedom to be a dog, all while remaining safe and contained.

amenities.heading: Everything You Need for Comfort
amenities.intro: The cottage is thoughtfully equipped with everything for a memorable stay.

categories.name: Kitchen & Dining
items: Full kitchen with fridge and bench oven
Microwave, toaster, and electric fry pan
All crockery, cutlery, and cookware provided

categories.name: Special Touches
items: Hobby farm setting with resident animals

location.heading: Peace, Close to Everything
location.body:
Sanctuary Cottage sits in the heart of Hope, Tasman — a tranquil countryside setting just 10-15 minutes from both Nelson city and Richmond. Wakefield is 18 minutes away, Brightwater just 10. Wake to birdsong and pond views, yet have cafes, restaurants, galleries, and shops within a short drive.

The location is perfect as a base for exploring the wider Nelson Tasman region. Cycle the Great Taste Trail through vineyards and countryside, take a day trip to Abel Tasman National Park, visit Nelson Lakes, or enjoy Tahunanui Beach. Local wineries, craft breweries, and Richmond's weekend markets are all within easy reach. The 5-acre grounds provide genuine countryside peace, yet everything you need is never far away.

highlights.label: Nelson & Richmond
highlights.detail: 10-15 minutes to Nelson city centre and Richmond shops, cafes, and restaurants

highlights.label: Wakefield & Brightwater
highlights.detail: 10-18 minutes to the charming villages of Brightwater and Wakefield

highlights.label: Great Taste Trail
highlights.detail: Ideal base for cycling the Tasman's Great Taste Trail through vineyards and countryside

highlights.label: Abel Tasman & Beyond
highlights.detail: Day trips to Abel Tasman National Park, Nelson Lakes, Tahunanui Beach, and local wineries

reviews.heading: Trusted by Guests Worldwide
reviews.summary: With a 4.95-star rating from over 436 reviews, Sanctuary Cottage consistently exceeds expectations. Guests praise the peaceful setting, welcoming host, and perfect accommodations for a romantic countryside escape.
highlights: The most peaceful place we've ever stayed. Waking up to pond views and complete silence was exactly what we needed. Viktoria is a wonderful host. Will definitely return.
A hidden gem. The views, the quiet, the cleanliness — everything was perfect. Viktoria's attention to detail made our anniversary getaway truly special.
Absolutely charming property. So peaceful and private, yet close enough to Nelson for exploring. The hot tub under the stars was the highlight of our trip.
We brought our dog and the fenced paddock was perfect — he had the time of his life. But honestly, the peace and quiet is what makes this place so special.
